emails.body: Fw: Rahil Jafry: USA: UPDATE 4-Dynegy hits upper end of Q3 earnings targets. FYI hope you're doing well. Had a good customer run all last week. R Rahil Jafry E-Mail: Rahil.Jafry@enron.com Work: 713.853.3206 Cell: 281.704.1060 Sent: Mon Oct 15 15:46:51 2001

emails.body: Re: Fw: Rahil Jafry: USA: UPDATE 4-Dynegy hits upper end of Q3 earnings targets. Have you done any deals yet? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld

emails.subject:
Re: Fw: Rahil Jafry: USA:   UPDATE 4-Dynegy hits upper end of Q3
 earnings targets.
emails.subject_base:
Rahil Jafry: USA:   UPDATE 4-Dynegy hits upper end of Q3
 earnings targets.
emails.body: Re: Fw: Rahil Jafry: USA: UPDATE 4-Dynegy hits upper end of Q3 earnings targets. Working on 3 deals a full services RFP with CVEC, service offering for Cogentrix (would be more imp. now that we're not doing any asset deals with them), and a "blend and extend" for 600-800MW of load. Cogentrix and CVEC are slated for this year, while the last one is for '02. Trying to give them a push for this year though. R Rahil Jafry E-Mail: Rahil.Jafry@enron.com Work: 713.853.3206 Cell: 281.704.1060 Sent: Mon Oct 15 15:22:30 2001
